zh.lifeSummary: 當Béatrice de BOURGOGNE於1257年10月15日出生時，她的父親Jean de Bourgogne26歲，母親Agnès de Bourbon23歲。她於大約1276年7月與Robert de Clermont capet在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1310年10月17日在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯坎塔爾繆拉享年53歲，埋葬在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也索維尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Béatrice de BOURGOGNE于1257年10月15日出生时，她的父亲Jean de Bourgogne26岁，母亲Agnès de Bourbon23岁。她于大约1276年7月与Robert de Clermont capet在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1310年10月17日在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯坎塔爾繆拉享年53岁，埋葬在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也索維尼。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: BOURGOGNE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: Béatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Béatrice de BOURGOGNE was born on 15 October 1257, her father, Jean de Bourgogne, was 26 and her mother, Agnès de Bourbon, was 23. She married Robert de Clermont capet about July 1276, in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 17 October 1310, in Murat, Cantal, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 53, and was buried in Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Béatrice de BOURGOGNE est née le 15 octobre 1257, son père, Jean de Bourgogne, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnès de Bourbon, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Clermont capet environ juillet 1276, à Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 octobre 1310, à Murat, Cantal, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.Temple de Paris, Le Chesnay, 78158, Yvel: Temple de Paris, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Béatrice de BOURGOGNE am 15. Oktober 1257 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean de Bourgogne 26 und ihre Mutter Agnès de Bourbon 23. Sie hat um Juli 1276 in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich Robert de Clermont capet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. Oktober 1310 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Murat, Cantal, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich und wurde in Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrice de BOURGOGNE è nata il il 15 ottobre 1257, sua padre, Jean de Bourgogne, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Agnès de Bourbon, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Clermont capet circa luglio 1276, nel Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 17 ottobre 1310, nel Murat, Cantal, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Béatrice de BOURGOGNEが1257年10月15日に生まれた時，父Jean de Bourgogneは26歳，母Agnès de Bourbonは23歳であった。約1276年7月にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメクラーモント-フエランドでRobert de Clermont capetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1310年10月17日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスカンタルムラットで53歳で死去し，フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスアリールソウヴィグニーにて埋葬された。

ko.Temple de Paris, Le Chesnay, 78158, Yvel: 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 템일 데 파리스
ko.lifeSummary: Béatrice de BOURGOGNE(이)가 1257년 10월 15일에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean de Bourgogne(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnès de Bourbon(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1276년 7월 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 클레몽-페랜드에서 Robert de Clermont capet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1310년 10월 17일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 캔탤 머앳에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 앨리어 소우비그니에 묻혔다.

pt.Temple de Paris, Le Chesnay, 78158, Yvel: Temple de Paris, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrice de BOURGOGNE nasceu em 15 de outubro de 1257, seu pai, Jean de Bourgogne, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de Bourbon, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Clermont capet aproximadamente julho de 1276, em Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de outubro de 1310, em Murat, Cantal, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.Temple de Paris, Le Chesnay, 78158, Yvel: темпл де пэрис, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Béatrice de BOURGOGNE родилась 15 октября 1257 г., её отцу по имени Jean de Bourgogne было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès de Bourbon, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Clermont capet около июль 1276 г. в местности клирмонт-фирранд, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 17 октября 1310 г. в местности мурат, канталь, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности соувигни, аллиир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Béatrice de BOURGOGNE nació el 15 de octubre de 1257, su papá, Jean de Bourgogne, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agnès de Bourbon, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Robert de Clermont capet aproximadamente julio de 1276, en Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 17 de octubre de 1310, en Murat, Cantal, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
